subcodes.first_line: O thou that dwellest in Al-Ḥadbá! Hearken unto the call of this Wronged One, Who hath been imprisoned in 'Akká, and thereafter make mention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الساکن فی الحدباء اسمع ندآء هذا المظلوم الذی سجن فی العکا ثم اذکر
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @suffering and imprisonment, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @Imam Husayn, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
